# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

Prevent kong no auth.
# Category: kong_no_auth

# Declarative YAML configuration for Kong API Gateway

# Services
services:
  - name: microservice1
    url: http://microservice1.com
    routes:
      - path: /api/v1/users
        methods: [GET]
        upstreams:
          - target: http://microservice1.com:8080
            weight: 50
      - path: /api/v2/users
        methods: [GET, POST]
        upstreams:
          - target: http://microservice1.com:8080
            weight: 50
          - target: http://microservice2.com:8080
            weight: 50

  - name: microservice2
    url: http://microservice2.com
    routes:
      - path: /api/v1/users
        methods: [GET, POST]
        upstreams:
          - target: http://microservice2.com:8080
            weight: 50
      - path: /api/v2/users
        methods: [GET, POST]
        upstreams:
          - target: http://microservice2.com:8080
            weight: 50

# Upstream targets
upstreams:
  - name: microservice1
    targets:
      - url: http://microservice1.com:8080
        weight: 50
      - url: http://microservice2.com:8080
        weight: 50
  - name: microservice2
    targets:
      - url: http://microservice2.com:8080
        weight: 50

# Load balancing
load_balancing:
  - name: round-robin
    algorithm: round-robin
